# PERF-154 negative: use http.HandleFunc with the bare function
lang: go
file: PERF-154-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"time"
)

func h(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	for _, c := range []byte("data") {
		_ = c
	}
	w.WriteHeader(200)
}

func Init() {
	http.Handle("/h", http.TimeoutHandler(h, 5*time.Second, ""))
}
